seo.description: DBS-checked, QCF-certified Support Workers for care homes, supported living, and community services across London. Same-day and emergency placements available.

fields.heading: Support Workers in London
fields.sub: Vigil Care Staffing supplies vetted, DBS-checked support workers to care providers across Greater London, for planned rota gaps, ongoing cover and short-notice shifts.

fields.heading: Dependable support workers for your service
fields.body:
Support workers help people live as independently and safely as possible, assisting with daily routines, personal care, mobility, medication prompts and emotional support. Vigil Care Staffing supplies experienced support workers to care homes, supported living services and community teams across Greater London.

Our support workers step in when your rota has a gap, whether that is a single shift, a block booking or longer-term cover during recruitment or absence. Every worker is matched to the setting and to the needs of the people being supported.

Vigil Care Staffing is a staffing supplier, not a regulated care provider. Our focus is simple: giving your service dependable, fully vetted people who are ready to work and fit your team from the first shift.

items.title: Rapid placement
items.body: When a shift needs filling at short notice, we draw on a local pool of available support workers so your service stays safely staffed. Our coordinators confirm availability and arrange cover as quickly as they can.

items.title: Fully vetted staff
items.body: Every support worker is DBS-checked, reference-verified and confirmed as eligible to work before they are put forward for a shift. Compliance is settled before anyone starts, not afterwards.

items.title: Role-specific matching
items.body: We match support workers to the setting, whether that is supported living, learning-disability services, mental health or residential care. The right experience is placed with the right service.

items.title: Flexible cover
items.body: Book a single shift, recurring shifts or ongoing cover across days and nights. Arrangements flex around your rota rather than the other way round.

items.title: Continuity of care
items.body: Wherever possible we send the same familiar workers back to your service, so the people you support receive consistent care from faces they know.

items.title: Directly employed
items.body: Our support workers are directly employed by Vigil Care Staffing, so vetting, training records and accountability sit with us throughout every placement.

fields.heading: Vetting and compliance you can rely on
fields.body:
Every support worker we supply completes an enhanced DBS check, right-to-work verification and reference checks from previous care employers before their first shift. We confirm mandatory training in safeguarding, moving and handling and infection control, and keep records current through ongoing professional development.

Our recruitment follows a CQC-compliant process designed to support your own safe-staffing records. Because our workers are directly employed, responsibility for their vetting and conduct stays with us throughout every placement.

items.a: We supply support workers to care providers across Greater London. Tell us your location and the type of setting, and we will confirm availability in your area.

items.q: How quickly can you fill a shift?
items.a: We hold a local pool of available support workers and respond quickly to short-notice requests. Availability depends on the role and location, and we are always clear about what we can cover.

items.q: What vetting do your support workers have?
items.a: Each support worker is enhanced-DBS-checked, right-to-work verified and reference-checked, with mandatory training confirmed before they start.

items.q: Can we book the same workers regularly?
items.a: Yes. Many providers use us for recurring shifts and ask for the same support workers to return, which helps continuity for the people they support.

locations.label: Care home CPD and CQC compliance

fields.heading: Need dependable support workers for your service?
fields.sub: Tell us your rota gap and we will match vetted support workers to your setting across Greater London.
